bindings.quest_threat: the one who set the fire

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, look at what they did. {quest_focus} was torched last night. Years of work, gone. I know exactly who is responsible: {quest_threat}, born out of {quest_origin}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. {quest_ally} saw someone fleeing {location_hint} just after the flames started. Find proof: look for {quest_item} near the scene.
dialogueChunks.outro: They destroyed {quest_stakes} out of spite. I will see justice done, one way or another.

playerResponses.text: Burning a person's livelihood is despicable. I will find who did this.
What kind of rivalry leads to arson?
This sounds like a personal feud. Sort it out yourself.

dialogueChunks.intro: Someone poisoned us, {player_name}. Deliberately. {quest_threat} contaminated {quest_focus} and now {quest_stakes} are paying the price.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I will not let this stand. Someone needs to {quest_action} {quest_time_pressure}. The {enemy_type} that nest near {quest_focus} may have been used to spread the poison. Check the area {location_hint} for {quest_item}: that could be evidence.
dialogueChunks.outro: This was no accident. This was a crime, and I want the one responsible to answer for it.

playerResponses.text: Poisoning innocents crosses every line. I will hunt them down.
This is a matter for your own people.

bindings.quest_reward_hint: a share of the recovered goods

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, {quest_threat} broke into {quest_focus} and took everything of value. This was not a random theft: it was born out of {quest_origin} and aimed straight at {quest_stakes}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I need you to {quest_action}. The trail leads {location_hint}. {quest_ally} believes {quest_threat} is selling {quest_item} to fund their escape.
dialogueChunks.outro: Bring back what was taken and there will be {quest_reward_hint} for your trouble. But more importantly, bring back our dignity.

playerResponses.text: Theft driven by spite deserves swift justice. I will go.
Tell me more about this share.
Chasing a bitter apprentice is beneath me.
